message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction failed primarily due to incorrect mathematical reconciliation of the subtotal and tax fields, despite correctly identifying all line items and the total amount.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "Incorrect subtotal extraction",
    "Incorrect tax extraction",
    "Mathematical reconciliation failure"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correctly extracted.",
    "date": "Correctly extracted (includes time, but matches gold date).",
    "address": "Correctly extracted.",
    "subtotal": "Incorrect. Predicted 12.40, Gold 14.85. The predicted value seems to be only the food subtotal, ignoring the beverage.",
    "tax": "Incorrect. Predicted 1.85, Gold 0.15. The predicted value is significantly higher than the actual tax on the receipt.",
    "total": "Correctly extracted.",
    "line_items": "All 5 line items were correctly identified with correct descriptions and prices, though raw_text and evidence_ids were missing."
  }
}
